title: Multi status driving dependency status change
excerpt:
I want to have an item to change status to done if the status of its dependencies has it’s status as either “Done” or “Another Status”. 
Is there a way to achieve this at the moment? 
Thank You!

posts.author: jon1 (Jonathan Hurr)
posts.cookedHtml:
